text: Excellent course and I really enjoyed the learning process I had been guiding through these weeks . This is a great entry level course for people like me who have few knowledge about HTML , CSS and JavaScript . The professor went through each concepts explicitly . Some concepts in JavaScript can be tricky for students without a CS background , but this course really makes things easier to understand . There are some small challenging in assignments , but it ' s still a great opportunity to transform all those concepts to my knowledge and experiences .
